== Notes for [[Item:Q107863|Q107863]] ==

* '''Abbasid Governor of Syria, Medina & Egypt'''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd_al-Malik_ibn_Salih

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salih_ibn_Ali

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000025181357804

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
